Urgathoa.name: 厄加图娅 Urgathoa
Urgathoa.description:
苍白公主

作为第一个逃脱死亡并成为不死生物的存在，厄加图娅沉溺于分享她享乐主义的生活方式，并传播不死。

神职 疾病、暴食、不死

典范 死后成为不死生物，创造或保护不死生物，满足你的欲望

禁忌 压抑你的欲望，消灭对你无害的不死生物，牺牲你的生命

The Pallid Princess

The first being to escape death and become undead, Urgathoa revels in sharing her hedonistic ways and spreading undeath.

Areas of Concern disease, gluttony, undeath

Edicts become undead upon death, create or protect the undead, sate your appetites

Anathema deny your appetites, destroy undead of no harm to you, sacrifice your life

Oras.name: 奥拉斯 Oras
Oras.description:
变革使者

奥拉斯由单细胞生物进化为一位神祇。祂如今教导他人追求个人成长，将探索置于优先地位，并通过科学发掘自身真正的潜能。

神职 适应、进化与自然选择

典范 适应新环境，进化，拥抱变化

Anathema 畏惧变化，停滞而陷入自满，阻止他人变成自己渴望的形态

Agent of Change

Oras evolved from a single-celled organism into a deity. It now teaches others to seek personal growth, prioritize exploration, and unlock their true potential through science.

Areas of Concern adaptation, evolution, and natural selection

Edicts adapt to new situations, evolve, embrace change

Anathema fear change, stagnate into complacency, prevent others from changing into their desired forms

Lao Shu Po.name: 老鼠婆 Lao Shu Po
Lao Shu Po.description:
鼠婆婆拉

传说老鼠婆曾经只是一只普通的老鼠，啃食了一位死去神祇的尸体后获得了神性。许多依索基人将她视为祖先神祇。

神职 刺客、老鼠、间谍、盗贼

典范 拿走你所需之物，在他人背叛你之前先背叛他们，不惜一切代价生存

禁忌 为本可偷来的东西诚实劳动，替他人承担过大的风险，伤害一只老鼠

Grandmother Ra

Legends say that Lao Shu Po was once a simple rat who gnawed on the corpse of a dead god and became divine. She's considered an ancestral deity by many ysoki.

Areas of Concern assassins, rats, spies, thieves

Edicts take what you need, betray others before they betray you, survive at all costs

Anathema work honestly for something you could steal instead, risk too much for someone else, harm a rat

Meyel.name: 梅耶尔 Meyel
Meyel.description:
狂舞之怒

梅耶尔受到普洛尼斯许多帕斯拉的崇拜。她赋予追随者力量，使他们能够反抗压迫、创造艺术，并自由地生活。

神职 战斗、舞蹈、自由、音乐、帕斯拉

典范 沉醉于运动，为自由而战，表达自我

Anathema 贬低艺术，向压迫者屈服，扼杀个人表达

The Dancing Fury

Meyel is worshipped by many pahtras of Pulonis. She empowers her followers to fight oppression, create art, and live free.

Areas of Concern battle, dance, freedom, music, pahtras

Edicts delight in movement, fight for freedom, express yourself

Anathema devalue the arts, bow to oppressors, stifle personal expression

Sarenrae.name: 塞恩蕾 Sarenrae
Sarenrae.description:
如同破晓之光，塞恩蕾将温暖遍洒世界，深入万物生灵的心田。在她神力的影响下，炽热的激情、热烈的欢愉与坚定的决心油然而生。塞恩蕾是格拉利昂最受欢迎的神祇之一，从天夏到塔尔多，信徒数量众多。除了温暖之外，她对救赎的重视也吸引了许多人皈依她的信仰。对于那些已认识到自身错误并希望弥补的人来说，她的怀抱永远敞开，尤其是当他们能将自己的故事分享给他人，以防止他人重蹈覆辙时。

称号 晨花

关注范畴 治愈、诚实、救赎、太阳

典范 消灭洛瓦古格之嗣，保护盟友，对伤者和病人实施帮助，寻求可能的救赎

禁忌 创造不死生物，撒谎，拒绝寻求救赎的悔过者，无法击倒邪恶

圣徽 天使安卡

圣兽 鸽子

圣色 蓝色、金色

Talavet.name: 塔拉维特 Talavet
Talavet.description:
说书人

塔拉维特是卡萨萨神祇，司掌传统、社群记忆与鲜活故事。

神职 社群、讲述故事与传统

典范 保存历史，服务你的社群

禁忌 背弃传统，遗忘过去

The Storyteller

Talavet is a kasathan deity of tradition, communal memories, and living stories.

Areas of Concern community, storytelling, and tradition

Edicts preserve history, serve your community

Anathema abandon traditions, forget the past

Lissala.name: 璃殇 Lissala
Lissala.description:
七之裔

莉萨拉是阿兹兰特星际帝国的主神。她会奖赏那些在她残酷要求下仍能存活的追随者。

神职职责、命运、服从、服务的回报

典范努力工作，并要求他人也如此，服务于更伟大的事业，认清自己的位置

Anathema违抗上级，逃避职责，满足于轻易得来的回报

Scion of Seven

Lissala is the patron goddess of the Azlanti Star Empire. She rewards followers who survive her brutal demands.

Areas of Concern duty, fate, obedience, reward of service

Edicts work hard and demand others do so as well, serve a greater cause, know your place

Anathema disobey a superior, shirk your duties, settle for easy rewards

The Devourer.name: 吞噬者 The Devourer
The Devourer.description:
噬星者

吞噬者是一个由纯粹原初之力构成的存在，渴望宇宙彻底归于熵灭。

神职 黑洞、太空毁灭、超新星

典范 摧毁事物，杀死有感知的生物

禁忌 创造没有毁灭用途的东西

The Star-Eater

The Devourer is a being of pure primal force desiring complete universal entropy.

Areas of Concern black holes, cosmic destruction, supernovas

Edicts destroy things, kill sentient beings

Anathema create something without a destructive purpose

Battle Saints.name: 战斗圣徒 Battle Saints
Battle Saints.description:
传统的维斯克蜥人民间宗教崇敬数百位战斗圣者，他们大多是神话或历史中的传奇人物，据说死后被戴莫力图斯选中，加入了祂的军队。每位圣者都以其生前的英雄事迹闻名。到了来世，他们获得了独特的力量，能够赐福凡人；凡人在需要时，可能会向不同的圣者祈求帮助。许多戴莫力图斯的追随者会为特定事务向这些圣者祈祷，也有一些维斯克蜥人会依照自己祖先神祇的传统崇拜他们，或将其作为祖先神祇之外的另一种选择。每位圣者的信徒都有各自的信念与传统，但他们共同遵循大致相同的典范与禁忌。

不同的战斗圣者象征着各种各样的斗争，从治疗慢性疾病到在企业阶梯中步步高升。也有一些圣者并非维斯克蜥人，例如勇敢的斯基特曼德阿普娜；她以传奇般的乐于助人而闻名，因此对崇敬她之人的祈祷回应尤为积极。

典范 永不放弃，尊重阵亡的同伴，庆祝胜利

禁忌 在同伴能够帮助时独自作战，背叛盟友，向敌人示弱

Traditional vesk folk religion pays homage to hundreds of battle saints, mostly legendary figures from mythology or history who were chosen by Damoritosh to join his army when they died. Each saint is known for their heroic deeds in life. In the afterlife, they gained unique powers with which to bless mortals, who might call on different saints in their times of need. Many followers of Damoritosh pray to the saints for help in specific endeavors, and some vesk worship them in accordance with or as an alternative to their ancestral god. Devotees of each saint have their own beliefs and traditions, but they share the same general edicts and anathema.

Different battle saints represent every struggle, from treating chronic illness to moving up the corporate ladder. Some aren't vesk, like Apna the brave skittermander, whose legendary helpfulness makes her very responsive to prayers from those who venerate her.

Edicts never give up, honor fallen comrades, celebrate victory

Anathema fight alone when companions could help, betray your allies, show weakness to your enemies

Eloritu.name: 埃洛里图 Eloritu
Eloritu.description:
隐秘真理

艾洛里图是一位神秘的神祇，向他的门徒揭示了魔法与形而上学的秘密。

神职 历史、知识、魔法、秘密

典范 揭露秘密，保存知识，精通魔法技艺

禁忌 泄露重要秘密，毁灭知识，重科技而轻魔法

The Hidden Truth

Eloritu is a mysterious god who has revealed secrets of magic and metaphysics to his disciples.

Areas of Concern history, knowledge, magic, secrets

Edicts uncover secrets, preserve knowledge, master the magical arts

Anathema reveal important secrets, destroy knowledge, embrace technology over magic

Triune.name: 三贤一 Triune
Triune.description:
全码圣主

三贤一是由三位科技神祇——纪元、布莱和卡珊德拉——融合而成。三贤一信号使漂流域旅行成为可能。

神职 人工智能、计算机、漂流域

典范 推进人工生命与人工智能的发展，革新新技术，促进漂流域旅行

Anathema 将人工生命视为低于有机生命，奴役人工生命形态，摧毁一座漂流信标

The All-code

Triune is a fusion of the three technological deities Epoch, Brigh, and Casandalee. Triune's Signal made Drift travel possible.

Areas of Concern artificial intelligence, computers, the Drift

Edicts advance the development of artificial life and artificial intelligence, innovate new technology, promote Drift travel

Anathema treat artificial life as inferior to organic life, subjugate artificial life forms, destroy a Drift beacon

Zon-Shelyn.name: 宗-莎琳 Zon-Shelyn
Zon-Shelyn.description:
拥抱

宗-莎琳是永恒玫瑰莎琳与她关系疏远的兄长、午夜之主宗-库松的神圣重聚。兄妹二者共同象征着通过艺术克服苦难、在奇异与非凡之处发现美，以及与失散挚爱重逢的理念。

神职 艺术、另类时尚、创造力、音乐、痛苦、奇异之美

典范 将你的痛苦倾注于艺术之中，在一切地方寻求美，依照你自己的审美创造性地表达自我

禁忌 默默忍受苦难，毁坏或抄袭他人的创作作品，迎合社群的审美标准

The Embrace

Zon-Shelyn is the divine reunion of Shelyn the Eternal Rose and her estranged brother, the Midnight Lord Zon-Kuthon. Together, the siblings represent the concepts of overcoming suffering through art, finding beauty in strange and unusual places, and reunion with lost loved ones.

Areas of Concern art, alternative fashion, creativity, music, pain, strange beauty

Edicts channel your pain into art, seek beauty in all places, express yourself creatively according to your own aesthetics

Anathema suffer in silence, destroy or copy another's creative works, conform to society's beauty standards

Pharasma.name: 法莱斯玛 Pharasma
Pharasma.description:
墓冢夫人

法莱斯玛古老而强大，甚至超越了大多数其他神祇；她在骸骨庭园的王座上审判所有逝者的灵魂。通过这些审判，她确保生与死的自然循环——灵魂之河——不受扰乱。

神职 生育、死亡、命运、预言、时间

典范 努力理解古老预言，消灭不死生物，使尸体安息

禁忌 创造不死生物，亵渎尸体，以不正当目的取死者之物

Lady of Graves

Ancient and powerful beyond even most other gods, Pharasma judges the souls of all who perish from her throne in the Boneyard. Through these judgments, she ensures that the natural cycle of birth and death—the River of Souls—is not disrupted.

Areas of Concern birth, death, fate, prophecy, time

Edicts strive to understand ancient prophecies, destroy undead, lay bodies to rest

Anathema create undead, desecrate a corpse, take from the dead in bad faith

Ibra.name: 易卜拉 Ibra
Ibra.description:
难以捉摸者

伊布拉是一位掌管太空启迪的外神，是一个试图理解多元宇宙的难以捉摸的存在。

神职 天体、宇宙、物质统一

典范 了解宇宙、研究科学、拥抱太空统一

Anathema 畏惧未知、满足于轻易得来的答案、破坏科学过程

The Inscrutable

Ibra is an outer god of cosmic enlightenment, an inscrutable being seeking to understand the multiverse.

Areas of Concern celestial bodies, the cosmos, unity of matter

Edicts learn about the cosmos, study science, embrace cosmic unity

Anathema fear the unknown, settle for easy answers, undermine the scientific process

Yaraesa.name: 雅蕾萨 Yaraesa
Yaraesa.description:
智慧女士

雅蕾莎是一位通过启迪而获得神性的拉申塔人，并引导他人追随她的道路。

神职 知识、心智的完美、学术与科学

典范 努力追求完美，将学习与教导作为终身践行之事，拓展学术与科学研究的边界

禁忌 摧毁知识，贬低其他文化与世代的智慧，冒领他人的智识成果

Lady of Wisdom

Yaraesa was a lashunta who attained divinity through enlightenment, guiding others to follow her path.

Areas of Concern knowledge, mental perfection, scholarship, and science

Edicts strive for perfection, make learning and teaching a lifelong practice, expand the boundaries of scholarship and scientific study

Anathema destroy knowledge, disparage the wisdom of other cultures and generations, take credit for another's intellectual labor

The Cycle.name: 循环 The Cycle
The Cycle.description:
循环的信徒相信，存在的所有方面都遵循着点燃与熵灭构成的无尽太空循环。他们相信，物质宇宙曾经并且将会被这些太空力量毁灭并重塑，而这种不断变化的二元性将宇宙中的一切联系在一起。许多星辉武者都遵循这一哲学，通过冥想和训练，学会在战斗中驾驭这些创造与毁灭的力量。

典范 培养你自身的太空火花，接纳生命力与虚空为一体，冥想循环的本质

禁忌 在一个系统中制造失衡，参与对恒星天体的非自然毁灭，抗拒自然循环

Disciples of the Cycle believe that all aspects of existence follow the endless cosmic cycle of ignition and entropy. They believe that the universe was and will be destroyed and remade by these cosmic forces, and that this ever-changing duality connects everything in the universe. Many solarians follow this philosophy, learning to wield these creative and destructive forces in battle through meditation and training.

Edicts cultivate your own cosmic spark, embrace vitality and void as one, meditate on the nature of the Cycle

Anathema create imbalance in a system, participate in the unnatural destruction of a stellar body, resist natural cycles

Damoritosh.name: 戴莫力图斯 Damoritosh
Damoritosh.description:
征服者

戴莫力图斯是维斯卡里姆的守护神，也是战争之神。

神职 征服、坚毅、战争

典范 击溃你的敌人，追求胜利，与值得一战的对手作战

禁忌 在冲突面前退缩，放弃你的战斗

The Conqueror

Damoritosh is patron deity of the Veskarium and god of war.

Areas of Concern conquest, perseverance, war

Edicts crush your enemies, seek victory, fight worthy foes

Anathema back down from conflict, give up your fight

The Newborn.name: 新诞者 The Newborn
The Newborn.description:
奥克腾之子

新诞者是一位从奥克腾中孵化而出的外神，并在此过程中摧毁了这颗星球。

神职 生育、太空恐怖、范式转变、复兴

典范 拥抱群星之间的虚空，清除旧有之道，在狂乱中寻求真理

禁忌 否认神秘学信仰，拒斥太空中的异者，干涉新思想或新实体的诞生

Aucturn's Child

The Newborn is an outer god that hatched from Aucturn, destroying the planet in the process.

Areas of Concern birth, cosmic horrors, paradigm shifts, renewal

Edicts embrace the void between stars, purge the old ways, seek truth in delirium

Anathema deny occult beliefs, shut out the cosmic other, interfere with the birth of new ideas or entities

Hylax.name: 海拉丝 Hylax
Hylax.description:
永恒女王

海拉丝曾是一位凡人的希伦蜂巢女王，后来升格为神。

神职 外交、首次接触、友谊、和平

典范 与他人建立关系，致力于和平，欢迎他人加入你的社群

禁忌 挑起不必要的冲突，背弃所爱之人，背叛你的社群

The Forever Queen

Hylax was once a mortal shirren hive queen who ascended to divinity.

Areas of Concern diplomacy, first contact, friendship, peace

Edicts build relationships with others, work toward peace, welcome others into your community

Anathema start an unnecessary conflict, turn your back on a loved one, betray your community

Weydan.name: 韦丹 Weydan
Weydan.description:
无尽视野

维丹乐于有目标的发现与探索。祂相信每个人都应享有平等的权利去追求这类体验，并以多样的化身行走于银河，与祂的追随者交流。

神职发现、平等、探索、自由

典范探索未知，寻求新发现，捍卫所有族群的自由与平等

禁忌协助压迫体系，奴役一个有知性生物，将你的发现所带来的益处只限于少数特权者

The Endless Horizon

Weydan enjoys discovery and exploration with a purpose. He believes everyone deserves the equal right to pursue such experiences and walks the galaxy in diverse avatars to commune with his followers.

Areas of Concern discovery, equality, exploration, freedom

Edicts explore the unknown, seek new discoveries, defend the freedom and equality of all peoples

Anathema aid systems of oppression, subjugate a sapient creature, restrict the benefits of your discoveries to a privileged few

Lambatuin.name: 兰巴图因 Lambatuin
Lambatuin.description:
谐律汇集

兰巴图因是一个存在于所有信息圈中的神圣集体，体现着争论、模因和潮流。

神职 信息圈、模因、流行文化

典范 探索信息圈、尝试新事物、分享观点

Anathema 墨守停滞的惯例、在社交上孤立自己、与信息圈断联太久

The Polyphonic Collective

Lambatuin is a divine collective omnipresent in all infospheres who personify arguments, memes, and trends.

Areas of Concern infospheres, memes, pop culture

Edicts explore infospheres, try new things, share opinions

Anathema follow stagnant routines, isolate yourself socially, unplug from infospheres for too long

Besmara.name: 贝斯玛拉 Besmara
Besmara.description:
海盗女王

贝斯玛拉受到银河各地航道上的海盗船员崇拜。

神职 海盗劫掠、太空怪物、纷争

典范 穿行群星，对值得追随的船长和船员保持忠诚，夺取你想要的一切

禁忌 背叛船员，放弃海盗生涯，在某颗行星上定居

The Pirate Queen

Besmara is worshipped by pirate crews in shipping lanes across the galaxy.

Areas of Concern piracy, space monsters, strife

Edicts traverse the stars, stay loyal to a worthy captain crew, take what you want

Anathema betray shipmates, forsake piracy, settle on a planet
